headline: Danaher (DHR) Stock Weighs Mixed Valuation Signals After Recent Price Rebound
summary: If you are wondering whether Danaher at around US$188.87 is starting to look attractive again, the stock's valuation metrics offer some clear signals that are worth unpacking. Over the very short term, Danaher has risen 6.2% over the last 7 days and 9.8% over the last 30 days, even though the stock is still down 18.0% year to date and has declined 5.4% over the past year. These moves sit against a backdrop where investors have been reassessing large healthcare and life sciences stocks, with...

headline: Eckuity Capital Launches Fund II and Backs Automata Technologies
summary: NEW YORK, June 25, 2026--Eckuity Capital, a North American healthcare growth equity firm, today announced the first close of Eckuity Capital Fund II and the fund’s inaugural investment, leading the Series C of Automata Technologies alongside Danaher, a global science and technology leader.

headline: 3 Healthcare Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. Those leading the charge have realized strong financial performance, and over the past six months, the industry’s 7.6% return has closely followed the S&P 500.

headline: Is Danaher (DHR) Using Masimo’s New FDA-Cleared AI Tool To Redefine Its Medtech Edge?
summary: On 22 June 2026, Masimo, a Danaher company, received FDA 510(k) clearance for an AI-enabled opioid-induced respiratory depression detection feature integrated into its Radius VSM wearable continuous patient monitor. This clearance highlights how Danaher is pushing pulse oximetry beyond basic vital sign tracking toward AI-driven, clinically actionable insights in hospital monitoring. Next, we’ll examine how integrating AI-based opioid-induced respiratory depression detection into Radius VSM...
